description: Prompt and variant definitions for the SDXL LoRA course report using the five local datasets.

prompts.base_prompt: close-up portrait of Ayanami Rei with blue hair and red eyes wearing a white plugsuit, clean classic anime style
prompts.lora_prompt: <EVA_rei_style>, close-up portrait of Ayanami Rei with blue hair and red eyes wearing a white plugsuit, clean classic anime style

prompts.base_prompt: Ayanami Rei wearing a black winter coat in a snowy city street, blue hair, red eyes, calm expression
prompts.lora_prompt: <EVA_rei_style>, Ayanami Rei wearing a black winter coat in a snowy city street, blue hair, red eyes, calm expression

prompts.base_prompt: close-up portrait of a young anime girl in a soft forest background, warm hand painted animation style
prompts.lora_prompt: <Ghibli_style>, close-up portrait of a young anime girl in a soft forest background, warm hand painted animation style

prompts.base_prompt: teenage anime character inside a cozy airship workshop, brass tools, cloudy sky outside, soft painterly lighting
prompts.lora_prompt: <Ghibli_style>, teenage anime character inside a cozy airship workshop, brass tools, cloudy sky outside, soft painterly lighting

prompts.base_prompt: magical girl portrait, wing-shaped hair ornaments, bright green eyes, soft smile, clean anime line art
prompts.lora_prompt: <cardcaptor_sakura_style>, magical girl portrait, wing-shaped hair ornaments, bright green eyes, soft smile, clean anime line art

prompts.base_prompt: close-up portrait of a magical girl holding a star wand, sparkling magical aura, warm golden light, classic shoujo anime style
prompts.lora_prompt: <cardcaptor_sakura_style>, close-up portrait of a magical girl holding a star wand, sparkling magical aura, warm golden light, classic shoujo anime style

prompts.base_prompt: magical girl anime portrait, expressive eyes, pink and pastel color palette, clean character illustration
prompts.lora_prompt: <mahou_shoujo_madoka_magica_style>, magical girl anime portrait, expressive eyes, pink and pastel color palette, clean character illustration

prompts.base_prompt: magical girl action scene, floating ribbons, glowing weapon, dramatic night sky, vivid cel shaded anime style
prompts.lora_prompt: <mahou_shoujo_madoka_magica_style>, magical girl action scene, floating ribbons, glowing weapon, dramatic night sky, vivid cel shaded anime style

prompts.base_prompt: close-up portrait of Nier, white short hair, black blindfold, black and white tactical clothing, serious expression
prompts.lora_prompt: <nier_automata_style>, close-up portrait of Nier, white short hair, black blindfold, black and white tactical clothing, serious expression

prompts.base_prompt: full body portrait of Nier standing in a ruined city, white short hair, black blindfold, black dress, cinematic lighting
prompts.lora_prompt: <nier_automata_style>, full body portrait of Nier standing in a ruined city, white short hair, black blindfold, black dress, cinematic lighting
